title: If I Were You – Flashcard Concept Mastery
author: Douglas James

questions.question: Who is Gerrard?
questions.correct_answer: A playwright who lives alone in a cottage
questions.explanation: Gerrard is a calm and intelligent man who uses his wit to escape from danger.

questions.question: Who is the intruder in the play?
questions.correct_answer: A criminal who enters Gerrard’s house with a gun
questions.explanation: The intruder plans to kill Gerrard and take his identity to escape the police.

questions.question: Why does the intruder want Gerrard’s identity?
questions.correct_answer: To escape the police after committing crimes
questions.explanation: He believes that living as Gerrard will help him avoid being caught.

questions.question: What qualities help Gerrard defeat the intruder?
questions.explanation: Gerrard stays calm and cleverly tricks the intruder.

questions.question: What false story does Gerrard tell the intruder?
questions.correct_answer: That he himself is a criminal on the run
questions.explanation: Gerrard invents this story to confuse the intruder and gain time.

questions.question: How does Gerrard finally capture the intruder?
questions.correct_answer: He pushes him into a cupboard and locks it
questions.explanation: Gerrard uses a clever trick to disarm and trap the intruder.

questions.question: What does Gerrard do after trapping the intruder?
questions.explanation: This ensures that the criminal is arrested and justice is served.

questions.question: What type of literary work is 'If I Were You'?
questions.explanation: The story is written in dialogue form and meant to be performed on stage.

questions.question: What is the main conflict in the play?
questions.correct_answer: The intruder threatens Gerrard’s life to steal his identity
questions.explanation: This conflict drives the tension and action of the story.

questions.question: What is the main message of the play?
questions.correct_answer: Intelligence and presence of mind can defeat danger
questions.explanation: Gerrard survives by using wit instead of force.

notes.title: Presence of Mind
notes.content: Gerrard stays calm even when threatened and cleverly manipulates the situation.

notes.title: Theme of the Play
notes.content: The play highlights that intelligence and courage are stronger than violence.

facts.fact: The play 'If I Were You' is written by Douglas James.
Gerrard defeats the intruder without physical violence.
